programme.title: Operation Gold Rush with Dan Snow
programme.desc: Dan Snow, Felicity Aston and Dr Kevin Fong finally arrive at the end of their gruelling journey in Dawson City. They set up a traditional mining camp in the heart of the gold fields, before facing their next challenge. They have just five days to find gold in an area that has already been heavily mined, and can only use the back-breaking methods of the 19th-century early pioneers.(n)

programme.title: Prince Philip: The Plot to Make a King
programme.desc: Secret History documentary telling the inside story of the dynastic tensions that were unleashed when Princess Elizabeth, the future queen, fell in love with Prince Philip. It was felt that Philip was rough and ill-mannered - and with the Second World War still fresh in most people's minds, the royal and political elite disliked his German roots. But following the death of King George VI in 1952, the establishment feared a dynastic coup, with the Queen torn between the two sides. The documentary examines the complexities and frustrations of the royal marriage, as the monarch struggled to reconcile the love of her husband with the suspicions of her family and her government.(n)

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The story of America's â€˜Liberty Ships', which were produced in incredible numbers and became known as the Model T Fords of the ocean.(n)

programme.title: War Factories
programme.desc: The remarkable story of how Stalin's massive war factories were dismantled and moved east on one and half million railway trucks, to avoid being lost to the Nazis.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of wildlife that inhabit remote islands, revealing the advantages and disadvantages of the creatures' habitat. Three-toed sloths in the Caribbean and nesting albatross enjoy a peaceful existence untroubled by predators, but other animals are not so fortunate. Marine iguanas in the Galapagos Islands are preyed on by racer snakes from birth, while penguins on the Antarctic island of Zavodovski risk being battered against the rocks by fierce waves.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Rare footage of the elusive animals that live in the unforgiving environment of the world's mountain ranges. A female snow leopard with a cub ends up caught between two rival males, grizzly bears rub themselves up against trees in an attempt to shed their winter fur, and golden eagles hunt over snow-capped peaks.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of plants and animals that live in jungles, one of the hardest environments to thrive in, including strange fungi and creatures that glow in the dark which have never been captured on film before. The programme also includes recordings of caimans and the jaguars that prey on them, freshwater dolphins that swim through flooded forests, undergrowth-dwelling frogs that have to defend themselves against wasps, and the Indri, the world's largest living lemur, which inhabits the forests of Madagascar.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of animals that live in the desert, including a pride of desert lions that risks hunting a giraffe several times their size. The film also features an immense swarm of locusts, sand grouse flying for 120 miles to gather water for their offspring, and an unprecedented recording of a tiny bat defending itself against one of the world's deadliest scorpions.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Wildlife that inhabit the world's grasslands, areas that are struck by some of the most dramatic seasonal changes seen in the world. The programme features footage of Brazil's giant anteaters and Asian saiga antelope, as well as lions engaging in ferocious battles with buffalo in the flooded Okavango, bee-eaters taking advantage of elephants to help them catch insects, and caribou embarking on migrations across the freezing northern tundra, stalked every step of the way by predatory Arctic wolves.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Footage of wild animals that have made a home in cities, including leopards on the streets of Mumbai, peregrine falcons hunting among New York's skyscrapers, hyenas that live peacefully alongside the people of Harar, macaques in Jaipur, and langurs in Jodhpur, which are regarded as having great religious significance by the citizens. The programme also examines how some animals are struggling to survive in urban environments, and questions how cities can be built to serve their needs as well as those of the human inhabitants.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: A marooned ironclad structure off the coast of England that hides a dramatic story of war and resilience, and a facility in the heart of America that helped tear apart a nation.(n)

programme.title: Train Truckers
programme.desc: Heavy haulage experts Ian Bagladi and Jamie Turnbull need to move a classical but abandoned 63-year-old, 70-tonne locomotive, through the English countryside.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that 'goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications'.(n)

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Mathewsons agree to sell a vintage threshing machine and large collection of tractors, but extracting them from old barns on a Yorkshire farm proves a bigger job than anticipated.(n)

programme.title: Open All Hours
programme.desc: Nurse Gladys Emmanuel's washing-machine breaks down, and Arkwright decides to try and lure her into his home with the offer of his vintage machine.(n)

programme.title: Open All Hours

programme.title: Jackie Stewart the Flying Scot
programme.desc: Profile of the legendary racing driver, tracing his early career and influence on Formula One.(n)

programme.title: Murder Maps
programme.desc: The crimes of Henri Landru, who targeted lonely and vulnerable women during the First World War. He seduced them with promises of marriage and lured them to houses outside Paris where the women vanished. With the police uninterested in investigating the disappearances, two women took it upon themselves to pursue Landru.(n)

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The bravery of the 333rd Field Artillery Battalion, a depleted unit of African-American soldiers who risked everything to fight off the Nazis at Bastogne, Belgium.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: The months following prime minister Neville Chamberlain's declaration of war against Germany, in which the only casualties on the home front were those who had to endure the blackouts. Elsewhere in Europe, the Nazi war machine cut a swathe of destruction. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Concrete channels hidden in a mountaintop forest, a collapsing bridge, a marooned military base and the upright rusting carcass of ship.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines how fleas are able to jump great distances for their size and attempts to discover how fast a cheetah can run.(n)

programme.title: David Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores animals that have developed tool-making skills to help them survive, including orangutans and crows.(n)

programme.title: Chris Tarrant: Extreme Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Broadcaster Chris Tarrant continues his travels along the world's most challenging railways. Here he attempts to cross the Andes, setting off from the coast of Chile and heading for the Bolivian capital of Sucre. Along the way he traverses some of the driest and most inhospitable environments on the planet, hitches rides on unusual trains and deals with altitude sickness at more than 3,000 metres.(n)

programme.title: Africa
programme.desc: David Attenborough explores the wildlife eking out an existence in and around the scorching wilderness of the Sahara, where only the toughest survive. It's a constant struggle against dehydration, as zebra battle over dwindling rivers, camels search for water and tiny barn swallows navigate thousands of square miles of barren sand to find a life-saving oasis. The naked mole rat avoids the heat by living a subterranean existence, while the silver ant is able to take on the midday sun - but needs a 'spacesuit' to do it.(n)

programme.title: Planet Earth II
programme.desc: Rare footage of the elusive animals that live in the unforgiving environment of the world's mountain ranges. programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: A look at the Shanghai Tower, which at a height of 632 metres is the second tallest building in the world, With a weight of 850,000 tons, it has been built to withstand winds of typhoon proportions.(n)

programme.title: Narrow Escapes of World War Two
programme.desc: The story of Major General Robert Laycock who rallied his ill-equipped troops to see off a German attack on Crete, Greece.(n)

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: How, in 1940, the French Army suffered a heavy defeat after underestimating the Nazis' strength while relying on First World War strategies and equipment to defend its frontiers. Narrated by Laurence Olivier.(n)

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: Forgotten relics from the defence of America's homeland, concealed by the banks of the Mississippi, and a concrete behemoth on the French coast that proved invulnerable to attacks.(n)

programme.title: History Hunters
programme.desc: The team acquire a personalised Victorian pistol and try to track down the original owner. A customer brings in brasses that his dad brought back from the Somme.(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Crafty con Fletcher helps new inmate Godber settle in by giving him a few lessons on coping with prison life. First episode of the classic comedy, originally broadcast in 1974, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale.(n)

programme.title: Porridge
programme.desc: Betting fever sweeps Slade Prison, but the stakes rise too high for some of the inmates, stretching honour among thieves to the limit. Vintage comedy, starring Ronnie Barker and Richard Beckinsale.(n)

programme.title: Salvage Hunters: Bitesize
programme.desc: Drew and Tee head to Belgium in search of continental treasures, visiting one of Europe's biggest flea markets before meeting a world-famous dealer with a host of items.(n)

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Experts try to restore family heirlooms and treasured possessions to their former glory in time for Christmas. Among the items is a Victorian version of a jukebox called a Polyphon, that has rusted into silence. programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Carol Vorderman, Kelly Brook, Rob Rinder and Mo Gilligan take part in the final charity culinary challenge, overseen by judges Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, and presenters Noel Fielding and Sandi Toksvig, making her final appearance in the tent before being replaced by Matt Lucas for the next series. The contestants must take on three tricky challenges - a sandwich biscuit for the signature round, a sweet bread-based technical, and a cake showstopper which reveals their favourite guilty pleasure.(n)

programme.title: Mend It for Money
programme.desc: Restorers compete to give objects a new lease of life with high-end makeovers, pitching against each other to win jobs and estimating how much profit the items will make when sold. Law-enforcement officer Nick brings in a vintage Allwin penny arcade machine and antique restorer Andy and woodturner Nick go up against each other for the opportunity to renovate it.(n)

programme.title: Joe Lycett's Got Your Back
programme.desc: Alongside sidekick Mark Silcox, the comedian scores victories for consumers everywhere as he takes on such issues as 'rubbish' council bin collections, devious scammers, dodgy delivery companies and thoughtless corporate giants. Aided by celebrity guest Katherine Ryan, this first edition sees Joe reveal the facts behind his infamous name change to Hugo Boss - as part of his crusade for consumer justice. Plus, fast fashion's filthiest secrets are unwrapped.(n)

programme.title: Five Guys a Week
programme.desc: A sales executive from Sunderland invites five men into her immaculate house, including a marine engineer, a part-time model, a financial adviser, and an oil rig worker back on dry land for two weeks' shore leave. Her decision to kiss one of her suitors during a night out leaves one of the remaining four with a tough decision.(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Surrey couple Debbie and Simon move into their fairy-tale castle, while Belinda and Lee expand their events portfolio by hosting a classic car weekend.(n)

programme.title: Posh Pawnbrokers
programme.desc: In Kent, bosses and brothers Charlie and Patrick at Nikolas Patrick consider doing deals on a Â£30,000 designer dress and a pair of very unusual antique 'rolling-eye' clocks. At Pickwick Pawnbrokers in London, boss Nathan hits the road to go and examine an unusual retro 'Bubbler' jukebox and a vintage 1950s coffee machine. A rare 260-year-old tortoiseshell and silver pocket watch may also be worth a small fortune.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay's next stop is Philadelphia, where family run restaurant Chiarella's is struggling to survive in an area full of thriving Italian eateries. Tommy and Dina Defino's marriage is on the verge of collapse and his sense of personal failure only adds to the troubles of their crisis-ridden business.(n)

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
programme.desc: With their children flying the nest, Andy and Alida have decided now is the time to fulfil their dream of buying a chalet in the French Alps. They are downsizing their house in Wokingham, Surrey, and splitting the funds between the UK and France, so Laura Hamilton and Jonnie Irwin have been sent on a joint mission. With a total of Â£650,000 to spend, and three shots each to find the perfect property - Laura in Berkshire and Jonnie in the ski-resort of Morzine - the pressure is really on for both of them to deliver.(n)

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to the Piebald Inn in Hunmanby, North Yorkshire, where the lack of a thermostat and a divisive design idea irritate some of the guests.(n)

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two in Cardiff, accountant Charlotte is going all out to impress and has spent the cash on a menu of luxury ingredients in her bid to scoop the Â£1,000 prize.(n)

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of Â£1,000?(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray's efforts to take an interest in one of Ally's hobbies backfire, leaving him searching for a particularly rare trading card to make amends. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Madylin Sweeten and Patricia Heaton.(n)

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra finally prepares a palatable meal, much to the surprise of her long-suffering family, who have grown accustomed to a steady stream of culinary disasters.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles is happy for his father to move in with him - especially once he finds out Daphne will be coming too. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, John Mahoney, Jane Leeves and David Hyde Pierce.(n)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles and Frasier fail dismally in their bid to get tickets for a popular new theatre production, while Daphne achieves the dubious distinction of having a photograph of her bottom appear in a Seattle newspaper.(n)

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp catches up with two couples who were looking for homes near the coast. Back in 2013, Phil Spencer helped retirees Peggy and Jon relocate from Derby to Norfolk so they could fulfil their dream of living by the sea, and two years earlier Kirstie was in Devon with local newlyweds Jamie and Sam, who needed help to spend an inheritance wisely. How have their lives changed since their original property search?(n)

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau: DIY
programme.desc: Wendy and Marcus start renovating their chateau's barn into a wedding venue, and Debbie and Simon host a Chinese cooking weekend for their family as a dry run for a new venture.(n)

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the coastal community of Long Beach, California, to save an Italian restaurant that was opened in 1958 and now under the misguided leadership of Nino, who blamed by brother Michael and sister Carina for the eatery's failings. Their 78-year-old mother Inge desperate for Nino to turn the business around, but the feuding family members will have to solve their differences first.(n)

programme.title: Great Canal Journeys
programme.desc: Timothy West and Prunella Scales explore the Marne-Rhine Canal in Alsace and Lorraine, close to France's border with Germany and running through forests, mountains and valleys. They get to grips with an unfamiliar system of locks, sample local wines, and pay a visit to the European Parliament in Strasbourg.(n)

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Tiger King: Murder, Mayhem and Madness, the Address by Her Majesty the Queen about the coronavirus, Keeping up with the Kardashians and news coverage of Prime Minister Boris Johnson's hospitalisation.(n)

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, inviting Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to take on guest captain Alan Carr and Roisin Conaty. Ivan Brackenbury - aka Tom Binns - joins wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers.(n)

programme.title: Prue Leith: Journey with My Daughter
programme.desc: The food writer travels to Cambodia with her adopted daughter Li-Da, in the hope of tracking down her biological family. Li-Da was like many of her generation evacuated from the country to escape Pol Pot's genocide, and Prue admits she has rarely questioned whether she could have helped her daughter connect more with her roots. Now, social media and DNA testing are allowing thousands of people to reconnect with lost relatives.(n)

programme.desc: The Solomons reflect on their sinful ways in a show that illustrates their misdeeds with clips from past episodes. Comedy, starring John Lithgow, Kristen Johnston and French Stewart.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Aunt Myra Doesn't Pee a Lot
programme.desc: Alan looks forward to Judith's wedding, but expects trouble when Charlie's romance with Myra continues to blossom. Starring Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan and Charlie contemplate their sexualities when they befriend a gay single man, and Jake develops a crush on a woman. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie takes Jake to the racetrack, and when Alan gives up his turn in the queue at the Department of Motor Vehicles to a pretty woman he ends up waiting all day.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is shocked when Chloe seems to show more interest in the handyman working on his house than him - but Alan has little sympathy for his brother. Guest starring Enrique Iglesias and Rachel Cannon.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Evelyn's new boyfriend takes Alan and Charlie to Las Vegas and the brothers deal with lingering feelings about their mother's dating habits, discussing the men who have come into and out of their lives. Guest starring Robert Wagner.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan and Charlie take Jake shopping when he prepares to start a new school - but soon land themselves in trouble. Starring Charlie Sheen, Jon Cryer and Angus T Jones.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie behaves strangely after spending time with his mother, while a woman Alan sleeps with also acts out of character the next morning. Janeane Garofalo guest stars, alongside Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Alan convinces Charlie that he needs to date more respectable women and sets him up with a judge called Linda, but the bachelor shows his inexperience in dating woman of his own age. programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.sub-title: Putting Swim Fins on a Cat
programme.desc: Charlie is forced to come up with different ways to keep his girlfriend's four-year-old son amused. Meanwhile Alan becomes a test subject for a drug study to raise some funds. Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer star.(n)

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Jake disobeys his father's orders and sneaks out of the house to attend a concert. Meanwhile, Charlie's girlfriend is embarrassed to be seen with him at an important dinner after a medication mix-up makes him change character. Charlie Sheen and Jon Cryer star.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Vic take on an eviction case in Nottingham, where a landlord wants his property back after months of rent arrears and alleged anti-social behaviour - and find themselves confronted by a volatile tenant who insists he has the right to stay and refuses to back down. The duo also chase Â£5,000 for an unpaid parking fine, which comes as a shock to the debtor, who has clearly hit hard times.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly Â£2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost Â£3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court enforcement agents Paul Bohill and Steve Pinner are in Birmingham on a potentially dangerous, full-scale eviction of a large traveller community. Meanwhile, in London's diamond district Brian O'Shaughnessy and Delroy Anglin are chasing nearly Â£6,000 owed by a jeweller to an unhappy customer, although a solicitor tries to convince Delroy his client owes nothing.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: High Court Enforcement Agents Paul and Steve are sent to north London to evict a young Romanian mother who owes Â£6,000 in unpaid rent, but when they arrive, they discover a family home that is not quite what it appears to be. Meanwhile, in Kent, Brian and Alan turn up the pressure on a debtor who has admitted to owing more than Â£7,000, but claims he cannot afford to pay up - despite having a garage full of expensive tools. Later, in south-west London, Brian accompanies Delroy as he tries to recover a Â£400,000 debt from a residential property, and when the pair trace the defaulter to an upmarket cafe, the man in charge lies about his identity.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A young mum locked out of her home by the young couple she allowed to stay there for free while the wife had a baby. Plus, an east London landlord who found half a dozen strangers living in his house, after his original tenant had run off and sublet the property. Meanwhile, Harrow Council raid a small two-bedroom flat in unsafe conditions.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The efforts of north London landlord Franc to evict a tenant withholding rent payments on a property whose boiler mysteriously stopped working whenever the rent was due, and a tenant with asthma who has been forced to sleep on his sofa for two years in a damp flat. Plus, a landlord owed Â£7,000 in rent discovers her nightmare is not over when she evicts the tenant and gains access to her property.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A Yorkshire landlord has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.sub-title: Car Thieves & Thugs: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. programme.title: Con Air (1997)
programme.desc: Honourably discharged Army Ranger sergeant Cameron Poe hitches a ride home on a maximum-security flight conveying some of America's deadliest criminals. When they hijack the plane in mid-flight, led by criminal mastermind Cyrus the Virus, Poe is forced to intervene. Meanwhile, US marshal Vince Larkin has an ongoing battle on the ground to prevent the plane from being blown to pieces. Director Simon West's blockbusting action thriller, starring Nicolas Cage, John Cusack, John Malkovich, Steve Buscemi, Ving Rhames and Colm Meaney.(n)

programme.desc: TV presenter Gail Porter has always hated her breasts, which are too large for her tiny frame, so she visits surgeon Paul Harris to see if anything can be done. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

Stewart and Vic track down a debt of Â£5,000 from the owner of a computer repair shop in Lincolnshire.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Stewart and Elmor visit Nottingham to chase almost Â£8,000 owed by a car dealership to a dissatisfied customer, while on the Isle of Wight, Brian and Del try to collect Â£3,700 of unpaid estate agency fees. The job begins peacefully, until one of the agents is physically assaulted by the debtor's wife. In Lancashire, Stewart and Iain struggle to identify the person who owes almost Â£2,000 after a failed compensation claim, while Del and Dael try to recover nearly Â£3,500 from a businessman in West London.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The enforcement officers visit a former professional footballer who owes Â£4,500 in unpaid legal fees, and in London the officers chase up a Â£4,000 debt owed by a car dealer. Elsewhere, agents Gary Brown and Cona Jackson are involved in a serious altercation with a young man who owes almost Â£11,000, who threatens the officers with a knife when they start listing goods to seize to offset the debt.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The officers chase a debt of almost Â£2,000 in unpaid parking fines, and later encounter the extraordinary case of a debt of Â£80,000 owed by a hotel owner to his ex-girlfriend. However, as they begin to search the property, they call upon police back-up as the agents fear the debtor may have access to firearms. Elsewhere, two officers head to a car garage in Manchester where the owner owes Â£2,000 after losing a court case over a faulty vehicle.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Justin is dismayed when the police reveal that they have spoken to Leah and that she is fine. Refusing to give up, he posts a message on her website. Willow frets over Alex's proposal that they buy a house together, which in turn leads Alex to question her commitment and make a heart-breaking decision.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The team tries to establish the cause of peculiar symptoms suffered by a teenage military cadet after an exhaustive training session - and events take an intriguing turn when the patient's drill sergeant is admitted soon afterwards. Chase's personal life is placed under the microscope when indecent photographs of him are posted on a social networking site, and House begins to bond with Rachel.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Cuddy's mother Arlene checks in to the hospital complaining of unusual symptoms, and insists House is removed from the case. However, the medic resorts to unconventional and illegal methods to discover details about her personal life that have been kept from her offspring. Matters take their toll on Taub, and Masters re-evaluates her responsibility to practice within a code of ethics. Guest starring Candice Bergen, with Hugh Laurie and Lisa Edelstein.(n)

programme.title: Home and Away

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Documentary in which journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. Here he exposes the rise in ram raids across the UK, with footage of two masked men using a 4x4 to pull the front off a cash machine at the University of East Anglia in Norwich. Nick also shows how detectives used laser-scanning technology to recreate a crime scene and close in on a gang that terrorised West Yorkshire pub owners in 2013.(n)

programme.title: Ian Huntley: 5 Mistakes That Caught a Killer
programme.desc: A look at the murders of schoolgirls Holly Wells and Jessica Chapman by Ian Huntley in 2002, focusing on errors made by the killer during the subsequent investigation - without which he might have walked free. Contributors include the man who put Huntley behind bars, former Detective Chief Superintendent Chris Stevenson, giving his first interview since the trial.(n)

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: Documentary using eyewitness testimony and footage from camcorders, CCTV and phones to examine traumatic, shocking, humorous and occasionally bizarre experiences of people who have become involved in disputes with neighbours. The programme also reveals how long-fought battles result in Asbos, evictions and sometimes violence.(n)

programme.desc: Ben Reeve from Lewisham Council's Rogue Landlord Unit aims to help Lola, who stopped paying rent 18 months earlier in an effort to get her negligent landlord to deal with her dilapidated flat's many problems. programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: In south London, Del and Dael Anglin receive a hostile reception from the brother of a debtor who has alreasy defaulted on a promise to pay Â£2,000 she owes to a storage company. In Worcestershire, Gareth and Craig try to recover Â£45,000 from a young online entrepreneur, who claims no responsibility for the debt he owes to his courier. Their target cooks up a flimsy lie in an effort to absolve himself, but dishonesty proves to be the least of the agents' worries when they discover a stash of guns at the back of the garage. In east London, an Indian restaurant owner begins to take his financial responsibilities seriously when Del and Dael start removing cookers and freezers from his premises, and a pair of pensioners in Oxfordshire hope the High Court will provide them a lifeline as they try to pay off a Â£4,000 bill to a solicitors' firm after a failed compensation claim.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: The agents try to recover more than Â£12,000 owed by a jeweller to one of his suppliers, but as the tension mounts, the debtor violently lashes out at one of the officers. Meanwhile, agents in London chase up more than Â£5,000 owed by a tenant to her former landlord for rent arrears, and also attempt to retrieve over Â£6,000 owed by a property developer.(n)

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: A Yorkshire landlord has to call in eviction specialists to remove tenants from the house he inherited from his grandparents. Music entrepreneur Donovan has not received rent from one of his tenants for seven months, so the case ends up in court.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: Masters tries to heal a rift between two warring sisters when one of them is admitted to Princeton-Plainsboro suffering temporary paralysis. Foreman volunteers to coach Taub before a medical exam, and House's attempts to play matchmaker uncover a secret.(n)

programme.title: House
programme.desc: The medic takes part in a school's career fair, where he gets into trouble after sharing his more explicit medical stories. Waiting outside the principal's office, he receives relationship advice from two fifth-grade students, who suggest House's selfishness is preventing him from showing Cuddy how he really feels.(n)

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Paul and Ben face a challenging eviction in London, where a vulnerable tenant in rent arrears has barricaded her front door, and the agents receive a tirade of abuse. Meanwhile, Brian and Del chase a debt of nearly Â£2,000 in Surrey, before trying to recover almost Â£3,000 in Northamptonshire. Finally, Steve and Ru head to Portsmouth to evict a young family for a landlord who wants her property back.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.sub-title: On Benefits: Could Work, Should Work
programme.desc: The documentary about welfare recipients follows people with big dreams of getting back into work, including an ex-soldier whose life was turned upside down after a false accusation of theft. Now he is rebuilding his life and saving as much money as he can as he tries to turn his interest in photography into a career as a photojournalist. The film also features a 48-year-old grandmother who dreams of getting back into security work, and a former salesman with a dream of making it in the music business.(n)

programme.title: 10 Years Younger in 10 Days
programme.desc: Lollipop lady Klara's self-esteem is at rock bottom as a result of adult acne, so the experts try the latest non-invasive cosmetic treatments - and give her a new wardrobe to boot. Meanwhile, charity director Debbie wants a new image that will encourage others to take her more seriously in the boardroom. She explores the latest fashions for the office, learns the secret to tackling grey hair and tries out a cosmetic treatment to smooth her complexion.(n)

programme.title: It's Your Fault I'm Fat
programme.desc: A 19-year-old starts a six-week diet plan and a complete lifestyle change as he tries to reduce his calorie count by half, with a personal trainer also on hand to help.(n)

programme.title: On Benefits
programme.desc: Welfare claimants for whom weight could pose a serious health issue, including 31-stone James, who rarely leaves home due to his agoraphobia, and 30-stone Kathleen, who fears her weight-related diabetes could kill her. In Brighton, housebound MS sufferer Bryan has found an unlikely way to pass the time - indoor archery - while in Lincolnshire, 27-stone Sarah dreams of making it as a plus-size model - but at what risk to her health?(n)

programme.title: Hannibal (2001)
programme.desc: Fugitive serial killer Dr Hannibal Lecter has gone into hiding as an academic in Italy, but a disfigured victim is determined to find him and inflict a gruesome revenge. FBI agent Clarice Starling is once again drawn into the doctor's deadly orbit as she finds herself being used as bait for the avenger's trap. Ridley Scott's thriller sequel, starring Anthony Hopkins, Julianne Moore, Gary Oldman and Ray Liotta.(n)

programme.title: Criminals: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: Journalist Nick Wallis joins police forces around the nation to discover how CCTV and technological advances are helping to bring criminals to justice. The programme reveals how essential surveillance cameras have become in the fight against crime and features footage of people caught red-handed.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Try and Catch Me (1977)
programme.desc: A grieving crime writer blames her niece's husband for her death and concocts a plan to take revenge, luring him to her walk-in vault, before locking him in and leaving him to die. She then puts her knowledge of the criminal mind to good use by covering her tracks, and although Columbo strongly suspects foul play, he finds clues are thin on the ground. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and Ruth Gordon.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Bird in the Hand (1992)
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler with a mountain of debts comes up with a plan to make some easy money. He plants a bomb under his wealthy uncle's car in the hope of inheriting a large legacy - but a hit-and-run driver jeopardises the entire scheme and Columbo is soon sniffing around for clues. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Tyne Daly, Greg Evigan and Don S Davis.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Ransom for a Dead Man (1971)
programme.desc: A devious lawyer hatches the perfect murder plot - she kills her husband, tells the police he has been kidnapped and leaves the body at the ransom drop, making it look like the criminals who abducted him finished him off. However, the crumpled cop sees through her ruse and begins picking apart her story in his inimitable manner. Detective drama, starring Peter Falk, Lee Grant and Patricia Mattick.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Prescription Murder (1968)
programme.desc: A psychiatrist having an affair with a patient murders his wife with his lover's help. However, while he establishes the perfect alibi he soon finds himself pursued by Columbo, whose meandering investigative approach conceals an uncanny gift for detection. First episode of the detective series, starring Peter Falk and Gene Barry.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: Caution - Murder Can Be Hazardous to Your Health (1991)
programme.desc: The host of a TV show is threatened by a rival, who has discovered evidence of his murky past. The presenter does away with his blackmailer using poisoned cigarettes, and seems to have pulled off the perfect crime - but a certain shabby sleuth is soon on the case and finds a few things that fail to add up. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk and George Hamilton.(n)

programme.title: Columbo: A Friend in Deed (1974)
programme.desc: A Californian police commissioner helps a rich, influential friend to conceal his complicity in murdering his own wife - but reckons without detective Columbo's timely intervention and his dogged determination to bring the truth to light. Crime drama, starring Peter Falk, Richard Kiley and Rosemary Murphy.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: A billionaire's stepson drops dead on a dance floor, the apparent victim of a deliberately administered drug overdose, and suspicion initially falls on his mother, a former stripper and model - but she too is later killed. Drama, starring Chris Noth, with Kristy Swanson and Arrested Development's David Cross.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The team is called in when a psychologist is found murdered outside a convenience store and all the evidence points to one of her patients - a disturbed man who refuses to take his medication. However, the discovery of a second, surviving victim behind the shop blows the lid off its theory.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A policeman's past comes back to haunt him when his wife alleges he raped her. As inquiries into the case deepen, a history of violence is exposed. Cragen is shocked by Jeffries' reaction when she is unceremoniously demoted for inappropriate conduct. Hard-hitting drama, guest starring Nestor Serrano and Amy Carlson, with Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Detectives investigate the sexual assault and suspicious death of an elderly woman, and question two teenagers who will only admit to breaking into the victim's apartment - until they confess somebody else was in there at the same time. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: The pregnant daughter-in-law of a prominent religious leader is found raped and murdered in her hotel room, and investigations reveal a dark secret behind the family's respectable facade. Acclaimed US police drama, starring Dann Florek, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice
programme.desc: An intensive investigation is launched when a Muslim student is murdered, while racial and religious tensions are heightened when a second suspect emerges.(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of an apartment block resident prompts Briscoe and Green to investigate her long-standing battle with the landlord in the hope of finding a credible suspect. Award-winning police drama, starring Jerry Orbach.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The husband of a well-known actress is gunned down outside a shop while holding a baby the couple had recently adopted from Africa. The murder inquiry soon turns into an investigation about a child's death when the identity of the adopted infant comes under question. Guest starring Anna Chlumsky (My Girl) and Jennifer Beals (Lie to Me).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The murder of a gay actor exposes a scandal that threatens to topple a New York church pastor who preaches intolerance toward homosexuals. Police drama, starring Sam Waterston and Alana De La Garza.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the murder of a publishing executive last seen engaged in a heated argument over a taxi. They learn that the killing may have been a race hate crime, with their main suspect having a long history of prejudice. However, a technicality arises in the case, threatening to deny them the conviction. Starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team is forced to exhume the body of a marine in a bid to ascertain whether a phone call to his widow, allegedly from beyond the grave, was a malicious hoax or evidence that he is still alive. Naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A woman is buried alive, but manages to claw her way out of the grave. The only thing she remembers is that someone has planted a bomb on board a Navy ship - but in the process of trying to learn her identity, the team discovers things are not as they seem. Sherilyn Fenn (Twin Peaks) guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A pregnant security guard is injured when a package explodes at a scientific research lab, prompting Green and Lupo to investigate a chemist's latest experiments. It transpires that research is being undertaken to establish whether it is possible to isolate the 'gay gene' in unborn foetuses. Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A dispute over a pair of trousers missing from a dry cleaner's ends in murder - and the ensuing investigation leads Lupo and Green to a businessman working for a shady multinational chain of department stores. Drama, starring Jesse L Martin and Jeremy Sisto.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A severed leg bearing a marine tattoo is discovered in a rubbish bin. Once the victim is identified, Gibbs and the crew follow the trail back to a small town, where an insurance fraud seems to have taken place. American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent
programme.desc: Goren and Eames discover a scrapbook belonging to a serial killer on death row, the contents of which suggest he may have claimed more victims than was previously thought. Goren later learns the murderer may have a link to his mother - but has only two weeks to learn the nature of the connection before the execution takes place. Guest starring Roy Scheider (Jaws) and Rita Moreno (West Side Story).(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is attacked at a hotel's opening ceremony, and the detectives are aghast when the owners of the family-run venture try to keep the incident quiet for fear of bad publicity - but everything is not quite as it seems. Meanwhile, Benson receives devastating news. Gritty drama, starring Christopher Meloni.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A gymnast is murdered, prompting the team to look into her high-pressure lifestyle for clues about the killer. The trail leads them to investigate the girl's trainer - whose strict regimen caused her to suffer emotional problems - a wealthy benefactor and a rival athlete. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni, Mariska Hargitay and Dann Florek.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A teenage girl claims she was assaulted by a man she met over the internet, leading the police to launch a massive sting operation to bring the culprit to justice - but the decision to place Munch in the role of the online youngster has higher authorities up in arms. Hard-hitting crime drama, starring Richard Belzer, Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A woman is raped at knife-point on a busy subway train in full view of the other passengers, and it soon emerges that the attacker is a serial offender bringing terror to the underground. A further assault later appears to occur, and a fellow passenger intervenes - but the suspected rapist claims to have merely fallen on top of the woman when the train jerked to a halt.(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a Navy veteran risks exposing military secrets, and Stone and Jefferies clash over their handling of the potentially explosive case.(n)

programme.title: Chicago Justice
programme.desc: In an episode directed by former ER star Eriq La Salle, the murder of a police officer who was involved in a secret deal brings up unfinished business for Stone.(n)

programme.desc: Kate Beckett faces the toughest case of her career after finding Castle's car engulfed in flames. He is dragged out, apparently kidnapped, and disappears for weeks until being found in drifting unconscious at sea suffering amnesia. Perplexingly, camera footage suggests he helped stage and finance his abduction. American crime drama, starring Nathan Fillion and Stana Katic.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate the shooting of a singer's wife, questioning the man's manager - who proves to have formerly owned the murder weapon. Meanwhile, an unscrupulous defence lawyer embarks on a smear campaign against the victim. Gary Busey guest stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate the death of a publisher found murdered in her apartment. Their inquiry leads them to suspect a former professional baseball player who had been acquitted of killing his wife, but had written a book about how he would have committed the crime. Starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Green and Cassady investigate an arson attack on a church - but the discovery of a man's body among the charred ruins, obviously killed before the blaze was started, turns the case into a murder inquiry. The victim later proves to have been a school tutor - who may have been murdered for teaching the theory of evolution.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Briscoe and Green investigate when a priest is found murdered in the confessional booth. The arrest of a teenager with a grudge seems to have them on the right track, but after discovering that the clergyman wasn't the killer's intended target they begin to focus their search on a petrol station cashier. Police drama, starring Jerry Orbach and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: A spy satellite technician's voyeuristic activities inadvertently lead to him witnessing the murder of a Navy commander involved in an important weapons project. Tipped off by an anonymous call, the investigators arrive at the base to find the victim has been stabbed in the back. Drama, starring Mark Harmon and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: NCIS

American naval crime drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum and Sasha Alexander.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lupo and Green are called to the scene after a white teenage boy and a black girl are killed in a shooting near a neighbourhood playground. However, progress is slow when the detectives find locals unwilling to talk about the events, but two brothers who were friends of the murdered boy point them towards a suspect. Jeremy Sisto and Jesse L Martin star.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A politician is embroiled in a triple murder, but persuading him to reveal the truth is only the first step toward unmasking a killer willing to go to any lengths to avoid capture. Crime drama, starring Sam Waterston and Jesse L Martin.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: The team races to find a sniper who is targeting marine recruitment officers and picking them off one by one. The only clue is a white feather left at the scene of each shooting - and in the absence of any other evidence, Gibbs uses himself as bait to catch the killer. American drama, starring Mark Harmon, David McCallum, Sasha Alexander and Michael Weatherly.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Three similar execution-style killings take place, and the team discovers one of the victims was going through a messy divorce. His widow falls under suspicion of committing the first two crimes to mask the murder of her husband - but, unfortunately for the agents, she has an alibi. Starring Michael Weatherly and David McCallum.(n)

programme.title: NCIS
programme.desc: Gibbs entrusts the team with the task of finding his former commanding officer, who has gone on the run rather than staying behind to face charges of killing a marine and stealing funds. Kate and Tony's investigation leads them to the missing man's cabin - which has been sprayed with bullets and contains an unidentified corpse. Mark Harmon stars.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A college student is found raped and dazed, but refuses to press charges because she is unable to remember the circumstances surrounding her attack. As Benson and Stabler set about piecing together the previous night's events, two fraternity boys become the main suspects. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: Stabler and Benson investigate the death of a world-famous singer's son, and soon begin to suspect that parental neglect may have been a factor in the case - leading them to fear for the victim's younger sister. Drama, starring Christopher Meloni and Mariska Hargitay.(n)

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit
programme.desc: A famous news reporter is raped by two men but fails to prove their guilt at the trial, and decides to challenge the cops' competence with a TV debate, only to be killed by a bomb blast. With one of her previous attackers cleared of the murder, it's up to the police to find his accomplice - and it becomes apparent the journalist is not the only victim in the puzzling case.(n)

programme.title: Fantasy Homes by the Sea
programme.desc: Michelle Ackerley meets Steve and Rachel, who met while working as cabin crew and have visited the beaches of the world together, but are keen to find their forever home in Sussex.(n)

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: How to Look Good Naked
programme.desc: Gok Wan helps Jade and her aunt Sadie rebuild their body confidence after battling cancer, setting out a radical agenda to get them loving themselves again.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Swansea to meet 15-year-old Jack, who suffers from a rare form of muscular dystrophy that has led to a lifetime of painful operations. His mother Helen and older brother Daniel do all they can to help but as he grows it has become impossible to get him upstairs and now he has to sleep in the living room, leaving the rest of the family with nowhere to socialise. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their three-bedroom semi, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Gabrielle Blackman on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision.(n)

programme.title: DIY SOS
programme.desc: Nick Knowles travels to Dartford to meet Scott and Jenny, whose third son Charlie was born with cerebral palsy and developmental delay. The boy needs round-the-clock care, which his mother gave up work to provide, but now he is 13, the family are struggling to cope in their small home. Having heard of their plight, the DIY SOS team turns up to transform their end terrace, backed up by an army of local tradespeople, with designer Naomi Cleaver on hand to ensure they don't stray too far from her vision.(n)

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Antiques experts Charlie Ross and Christina Trevanion set off on a trip around Britain seeking out bargains they hope will make a profit at auction. They begin their journey in Inverness, in the Highlands, before heading south to an auction in Edinburgh. programme.title: The Sheriffs Are Coming: Compilation
programme.desc: Officers attempts to remove squatters from a building owned by a charity, and the animator responsible for creating much-loved children's TV characters hopes that a person who used his designs without permission will hand over the royalties he is owed. programme.desc: Darryl and Mark visit a Cambridgeshire garage owner who owes a refund to a buyer whose car had multiple issues, and Pete heads off to see a campervan company for a disgruntled former customer. programme.title: A Handful of Dust (1989)
programme.desc: A couple's life is disrupted by a penniless woman who arrives for the weekend, setting in motion a disastrous sequence of events. Drama, starring Judi Dench, whose performance won her a Bafta award, and James Wilby.(n)

programme.title: The Importance of Being Earnest (2002)
programme.desc: Two bachelors using the same pseudonym capture the hearts of a couple of girls during a delightful weekend in the countryside. However, their cunning deception leads to all manner of hilarious confusion as the ladies in question attempt to work out who is who. Adaptation of Oscar Wilde's comedy, starring Rupert Everett, Colin Firth, Frances O'Connor, Reese Witherspoon, Judi Dench and Tom Wilkinson.(n)

programme.title: A Matter of Choice (1963)
programme.desc: A married woman finds herself caught in a moral dilemma when children inadvertently cause the death of her diabetic lover. Drama, starring Anthony Steel, Jeanne Moody and Ballard Berkeley.(n)

programme.title: Operation Amsterdam (1958)
programme.desc: A stiff-upper-lipped British Army officer engages in a spot of larceny to aid the war effort. Ordered to Amsterdam, he joins forces with two cunning Dutchmen and steals a secret cache of diamonds from a bank vault, thus preventing the gems falling into Nazi hands. Second World War adventure, starring Peter Finch, Tony Britton and Eva Bartok.(n)

programme.title: Paper Tiger (1975)
programme.desc: An English tutor enthralls a Japanese ambassador's son with improbable fantasies of his heroic exploits, but then finds himself forced to act them out for real when he and the boy are both kidnapped. Comedy adventure, starring David Niven, Toshiro Mifune, Hardy Kruger and Ivan Desny.(n)

programme.title: Faking It
programme.desc: Country vicar Nigel Done tosses aside his dog collar and steps into a snappy suit as he swaps his sleepy parish lanes for the mean streets of Essex and a stint as a second-hand car salesman. programme.desc: Twelve months with the staff and patients of one of Britain's leading cancer hospitals, the Royal Marsden in London. The film follows Rosemary, Phil and Ray as they undergo remarkable new treatments - including a multimillion-pound genetically targeted drug to fight skin cancer and advanced robotic surgery - and reveals the medical breakthroughs that are offering new hope in defeating a disease that more than one in three people will develop at some stage.(n)

programme.desc: Drama documentary examining the impact of climate change. In an environmentally devastated future, the last man alive looks back at footage from 2008 to uncover the reasons why the human race did so little to prevent climate change before it was too late, examining real life stories including a windfarm developer fighting public opposition and an elderly mountain guide who has witnessed the melting of Alpine glaciers first-hand.(n)

They work as a team and play strategically to answer general knowledge questions against the clock and race down the game board to the exit without being caught.(n)

programme.title: Who Wants to Be a Millionaire?
programme.desc: Chris Tarrant invites another line-up of contestants to answer questions that could change their lives - with lifelines Ask the Audience, Phone a Friend and 50-50 available to them if they get stuck.(n)
